name: obsideo
description: Encrypted S3-compatible storage with cryptographic possession proofs. 12 GB free, signup in-conversation, credentials stay on your machine.
long_description: Give Claude durable, private object storage. Obsideo is encrypted, S3-compatible storage where every stored object is replicated to 3 independent providers and challenge-verified with chunk-level merkle proofs every 4 hours. Sign up in-conversation (email code, 12 GB free, no card), then store, retrieve, list, and delete objects. Optional client-side AES-256-GCM encryption with a locally generated, user-held key makes objects unreadable to the platform. This extension runs entirely on your machine: credentials and encryption keys are stored locally in ~/.obsideo/mcp.json and are never sent to or hosted by Obsideo. Deletes are authorized by an Ed25519 signature only you hold.

tools.name: signup_start
tools.description: Start Obsideo signup: emails a 6-digit verification code (12 GB free, no card)

tools.name: signup_verify
tools.description: Complete signup; keypair generated locally, credentials stored on this machine

tools.name: put
tools.description: Store a file or inline content as an object, optionally client-side encrypted
